headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: April 30, 2026**
article:
The Chicago Cubs edged out the Arizona Diamondbacks 6-5 in a close game, with Geraldo Perdomo leading the Diamondbacks' offense with 2 hits, 1 home run, and 3 RBIs. The Texas Rangers secured a narrow win over the Detroit Tigers, finishing with a final score of 5-4, led by Danny Jansen's home run and one RBI. The Pittsburgh Pirates dominated the Cincinnati Reds 9-1, with Henry Davis leading the Pirates' charge with two home runs and three RBIs.

Several key players have been placed on the injured list, including Seattle Mariners right-handed pitcher Matt Brash due to right lat inflammation, effective retroactive to April 30, 2026. Other notable injuries include Ryan Helsley of the Baltimore Orioles, Brandon Woodruff of the Milwaukee Brewers, Kyle Backhus of the Philadelphia Phillies, Luis Robert Jr. of the New York Mets, Brandon Williamson of the Cincinnati Reds, Javier Báez of the Detroit Tigers, and Casey Mize of the Detroit Tigers.

The Detroit Tigers have bolstered their roster with the addition of infielder Zack Short, acquired from the Washington Nationals in exchange for cash. The Los Angeles Dodgers acquired second baseman Tyler Fitzgerald from the Toronto Blue Jays for cash, while the Toronto Blue Jays received catcher Willie MacIver from the Texas Rangers in a separate trade.

top_news.title: **Diamondbacks Fall Short in Chicago**
top_news.summary: The Chicago Cubs edged out the Arizona Diamondbacks 6-5 in a close game. Geraldo Perdomo led the Diamondbacks' offense with 2 hits, 1 home run, and 3 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Rangers Edge Tigers in Thrilling 5-4 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Texas Rangers secured a narrow win over the Detroit Tigers, finishing with a final score of 5-4. Danny Jansen led the Rangers' offense with a home run and one RBI.

top_news.title: **Reds Fall to Pirates in One-Sided Affair**
top_news.summary: The Cincinnati Reds suffered a 9-1 loss to the Pittsburgh Pirates, with the Pirates' offense dominating the game. Henry Davis led the Pirates' charge with two home runs and three RBIs.

top_news.title: **Brewers Cruise Past Nationals 6-1**
top_news.summary: The Milwaukee Brewers secured a convincing 6-1 victory over the Washington Nationals, with Jacob Misiorowski earning the win after 5.1 innings of scoreless relief. William Contreras led the Brewers' offense with a 4-hit performance, driving in 3 runs.

top_news.title: **Matt Brash Placed on 15-Day Injured List**
top_news.summary: Seattle Mariners right-handed pitcher Matt Brash has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to right lat inflammation, effective retroactive to April 30, 2026.

top_news.title: **Tigers Acquire Zack Short in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Detroit Tigers have bolstered their roster with the addition of infielder Zack Short, acquired from the Washington Nationals in exchange for cash. Short joins the Tigers' lineup as the team looks to improve its performance.
